arts.sum: Scholes joked that he had built up a reputation as a 'teacher's pet' under Man United 's legendary manager, but believed he was about to be sold by the club after a bust-up following a defeat.

arts.sum: The legendary Scottish manager had to rebuild his team on multiple occasions during his 27-year-stay, and this meant moving players on to bring in fresh talent.

arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy spent five years at Manchester United during his playing career and had no hesitation when the opportunity to return to Old Trafford came up in the summer
